race.comment: SIR RANDOLPH (6) comes through stronger racing and the rise in trip looks perfect for him now. Expecting him to take closer order from the kind draw and have plenty to offer when they sprint. AITCH D'AMICO (3) kept finding in town last start when only missing by a neck to the favourite. Drops back in grade and only needs to hold his form to be in the finish again. FIORA BLUE (1) bounced straight back to form third-up when demolishing his rivals from the front at Bordertown. Full of confidence now and will prove tough to reel in if left alone again. MIKKI TANGO (2) also bounced back sharply last start when chasing strongly to arrive just in time at Strathalbyn. Draws out again, so watch for him running on late. THE TRUE BELIEVER (4) got the job done at big odds at the latest in a sharp return to form. Deserves more respect this time.
